message:
feat(wa-core): add CASS integration and session correlation modules

cass.rs (198 new lines of logic):
  Integrate with the CASS (Cross-Agent Session Search) system to enable
  wa-core to query historical agent sessions for context. Provides
  session lookup, relevance scoring, and result formatting for workflow
  decision support.

session_correlation.rs (654 lines):
  New module implementing session correlation logic that matches wezterm
  pane activity with agent coding sessions. Tracks temporal overlap,
  command patterns, and workspace affinity to link terminal activity to
  the correct agent session for audit and replay purposes.

tests/cass_integration.rs (204 lines):
  Integration test suite validating CASS query construction, response
  parsing, and session correlation accuracy across multiple concurrent
  agent scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
